texto: Totalitarianism in power invariably replaces all first-rate talents, regardless of their sympathies, with those crackpots and fools whose lack of intelligence and creativity is still the best guarantee of their loyalty.
explicacao: Citação de Hanna Arendt sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “Totalitarianism in power invariably replaces all first-rate talents, regardless of their sympathi…” articula inteligencia, loyalty, totalitarianism em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como totalitarianism.

texto: It seems symbolic of this all-pervading unpredictability that those engaged in the perfection of the means of destruction have finally brought about a level of technical development where their aim, namely warfare, is on the point of disappearing altogether.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Hanna Arendt sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “It seems symbolic of this all-pervading unpredictability that those engaged in the perfection of …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, violence, seems, útil em momentos de reflexao.

texto: Th danger of exchanging the necessary insecurity of philosophical thought for the total explanation of an ideology and its [worldview], is not even so much the risk of falling for some usually vulgar, always uncritical assumption as of exchanging the freedom inherent in man's capacity to think for the straight-jacket of logic with which man can force himself almost as violently as he is forced by some outside power.
explicacao: Citação de Hanna Arendt sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Th danger of exchanging the necessary insecurity of philosophical thought for the total explanati…” articula reflexao, assumption, ideology em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como ideology e logic.
